title: coptosperma graveolens var. impolitum
intro: Coptosperma graveolens var. impolitum, also known as the 'Unpolite Coptosperma', is a variety of the Coptosperma graveolens plant, a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in West Africa, where it is valued for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The medicinal properties of Coptosperma graveolens var. impolitum are believed to offer various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into decoctions, infusions, or ointments, which are applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
